actionCalls.description: Deep-clones the full sales-transaction (Quote) object graph — lines, groups, bundle configs, and custom fields — in the current transaction. For a whole-quote clone recordIds and salesTransactionId are both the source Quote id; options is omitted (ramp-segment-only). Returns the new Quote id in newRecordId.
actionCalls.name: DeepClone
actionCalls.label: Deep Clone Sales Transaction

assignments.description: Wrap the single source Quote id into the recordIds text collection the core action requires (List<String>, single-record only).
assignments.name: BuildRecordIds
assignments.label: Build Record Ids

assignments.description: Capture the flow fault message so the Apex caller can surface it (and retry the transient config-rules cache error).
assignments.name: SetError
assignments.label: Set Error

Flow.description: Delta Term Builder: headless flow that runs the standard Deep Clone Sales Transaction core action IN-TRANSACTION (no HTTP callout), cloning a source Quote's full object graph into a new Quote. Invoked synchronously from RLM_DeltaTermBuilderController.createRenewalFromContract via Flow.Interview; the Apex owns the contract/SourceQuoteId guard, rename, and Draft reset. Input: sourceQuoteId. Outputs: newQuoteId, errorMessage.
Flow.label: DL Deep Clone Sales Transaction

variables.description: Flow fault message when the deep clone fails (e.g. the transient config-rules cache error); null on success.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: ID of the newly cloned Quote (the renewal shell). Output.
variables.name: newQuoteId

variables.description: Single-element text collection carrying the source Quote id for the core action's recordIds (List<String>) input.
variables.name: recordIds

variables.description: Input: the source Quote (Contract.SourceQuoteId) to deep clone.
variables.name: sourceQuoteId
